sql: SELECT id, name, email, 'users' as source FROM users WHERE status = #{userStatus} UNION SELECT id, name, email, 'admins' as source FROM users WHERE department = 'Admin' UNION SELECT id, name, email, 'managers' as source FROM users WHERE department = 'Manager' ORDER BY #{sortField} LIMIT #{limit}
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, 'users' as source FROM users
<where>
    <if test="userStatus != null">
        AND status = #{userStatus}
    </if>
</where>
UNION
SELECT id, name, email, 'admins' as source FROM users WHERE department = 'Admin'
UNION
SELECT id, name, email, 'managers' as source FROM users WHERE department = 'Manager'
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
<if test="limit != null">
    LIMIT #{limit}
</if>
